metadata.name: humanofi
metadata.description: Humanofi Protocol — The first market where humans are the asset

instructions.name: buy
docs: Buy tokens from the Human Curve™.
- CPI Guard: rejects program-to-program calls (anti-bot)
- SOL → Human Curve calculation (k-deepening + merit split)
- Fees: 3% creator vault + 2% protocol + 1% k-depth
- Mint 86% tokens → buyer ATA (frozen)
- Mint 10% tokens → creator ATA (Merit Reward, frozen)
- Mint 4% tokens → protocol ATA (Merit Fee, frozen)
- Price Stabilizer: auto-sells protocol tokens if price spiked > 2%
- Slippage protection: reverts if tokens received < min_tokens_out

instructions.name: claim_creator_fees
docs: Claim accumulated creator fees from the CreatorFeeVault PDA.
- Only the creator of the token can call this
- 15-day cooldown between claims
- All unclaimed fees transferred to creator's wallet as SOL

accounts.name: creator
docs: The creator claiming fees

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 Mint

accounts.name: creator_fee_vault
docs: Creator Fee Vault PDA (SOL stored as lamports)

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program

instructions.name: create_token
docs: Creates a new personal token with the Human Curve™.
Initializes:
- Token-2022 Mint (freeze_authority = bonding_curve PDA)
- BondingCurve PDA (Human Curve™: x · y = k, SOL reserve)
- CreatorVault PDA (vesting + Smart Sell Limiter tracker)
- CreatorFeeVault PDA (accumulates 3% of trading fees)
- ProtocolVault PDA (Stabilizer token treasury)
- On-chain metadata (name, symbol, image URI)
- Initial SOL liquidity injected into bonding curve reserve
No tokens are minted at creation. Creator earns tokens
via the Merit Reward (10%) on each subsequent buy.
Protocol earns 4% for the Price Stabilizer.

accounts.name: creator
docs: The creator who is launching their personal token.
Pays for all account creation + initial liquidity.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 Mint with MetadataPointer extension.
mint_authority and freeze_authority = bonding_curve PDA.

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: Bonding Curve PDA — manages the token's Human Curve™ market.

accounts.name: creator_vault
docs: Creator Vault PDA — tracks vesting and sell limiter.

accounts.name: creator_fee_vault
docs: Creator Fee Vault PDA — accumulates 3% of trading fees.

accounts.name: protocol_vault
docs: Protocol Vault PDA — holds protocol's Merit Fee tokens.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated Token Program (for creating ATAs)

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program

instructions.name: sell
docs: Sell tokens back via the Human Curve™.
- CPI Guard: rejects program-to-program calls (anti-bot)
- If creator: verify vesting (Year 1 lock) + Smart Sell Limiter (5% impact max) + cooldown (30 days)
- Thaw → Burn → Calculate SOL return → Distribute fees → Transfer → Re-freeze
- Fees: 3% creator vault + 2% protocol + 1% k-depth
- Slippage protection: reverts if SOL received < min_sol_out

docs: The seller

errors.msg: Token name must be between 1 and 32 characters

errors.name: InvalidTokenSymbol
errors.msg: Token symbol must be between 1 and 10 characters

errors.msg: Bonding curve is not active

errors.name: InsufficientSolAmount
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL for this purchase

errors.name: InsufficientTokenBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance to sell

errors.name: PriceCalculationZero
errors.msg: Calculated price is zero — amount too small

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow in bonding curve calculation

errors.name: InsufficientReserve
errors.msg: Insufficient reserve in bonding curve

errors.name: PoolDepleted
errors.msg: Pool depleted — insufficient token reserve to complete trade

errors.name: ZeroPurchaseAmount
errors.msg: Purchase amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: CreatorVestingLocked
errors.msg: Creator tokens are still locked — Year 1 vesting (0% sellable)

errors.name: SellImpactExceeded
errors.msg: Sell exceeds max price impact (5% limit per transaction)

errors.name: CreatorSellCooldown
errors.msg: Creator must wait 30 days between sells

errors.name: UnauthorizedCreator
errors.msg: Only the creator can perform this action

errors.name: NoRewardsToClaim
errors.msg: No rewards available to claim

errors.name: ZeroHolderBalance
errors.msg: Holder must have a positive token balance to claim rewards

errors.name: NoFeesToClaim
errors.msg: No fees available to claim

errors.name: CreatorClaimCooldown
errors.msg: Creator must wait 15 days between fee claims

errors.name: FeeOverflow
errors.msg: Fee calculation overflow

errors.name: UnauthorizedTransfer
errors.msg: Unauthorized: transfer blocked — tokens can only be traded via Humanofi

errors.name: CpiGuard
errors.msg: CPI guard: only direct wallet transactions are allowed — no bots or programs

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid mint for this operation

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Token amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientInitialLiquidity
errors.msg: Initial liquidity below minimum — inject more SOL to give your token value

errors.name: ExcessiveInitialLiquidity
errors.msg: Initial liquidity exceeds maximum

errors.name: InvalidTreasury
errors.msg: Invalid treasury wallet — must match protocol treasury

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage exceeded — received less than minimum specified

fields.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint this curve manages

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator who launched this token

fields.name: x
docs: Total curve reserve (lamports) = sol_reserve + depth_parameter
x = vault_réel + D (D is a mathematical depth parameter, not real SOL)

fields.name: y
docs: Token reserve counter (decreases on buy, increases on sell)
Starts at INITIAL_Y = 10^12 base units

fields.name: k
docs: The curve invariant — EVOLVES via k-deepening
k(0) = x₀ · y₀, k(t+1) ≥ k(t) always

fields.name: supply_public
docs: Tokens held by public holders (buyers)

fields.name: supply_creator
docs: Tokens held by the creator (Merit Reward, locked)

fields.name: supply_protocol
docs: Tokens held by protocol vault (Merit Fee, used by Stabilizer)

fields.name: sol_reserve
docs: Real SOL in the vault (lamports) — what the PDA actually holds
INVARIANT: sol_reserve = x - depth_parameter at all times

fields.name: depth_parameter
docs: Depth Parameter D = DEPTH_RATIO × V (fixed at creation, never changes)
This is NOT real SOL. It's a mathematical parameter that gives
the curve depth from day 1, like Curve Finance's amplification factor A.
Nobody can ever withdraw D. It only exists in the formula.
⚠️ IMMUTABLE AFTER CREATION — modifying D breaks solvency invariant

fields.name: twap_price
docs: EMA of price (P × PRICE_PRECISION for precision)
Updated after every buy/sell

fields.name: trade_count
docs: Number of trades processed (for initial seeding of TWAP)

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp of token creation

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the curve is active (can be deactivated by governance)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

docs: The Token-2022 mint this vault belongs to

fields.name: total_claimed

fields.name: last_claim_at
docs: Timestamp of the last successful claim

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when this vault was created
